summary: Frontend testing of 3 new interactive add-on previews on Calculator page: Dark Mode, Pop-up, and Before & After Slider. All features verified working correctly. Previews appear when add-ons are toggled ON, disappear when toggled OFF. Prices correctly added/deducted. All 3 add-ons appear in quote summary sidebar.

critical_code_review_comments: DarkModePreview component (lines 207-247) correctly implements interactive sun/moon toggle with color transitions
PopupPreview component (lines 251-297) correctly shows discount popup with 10% offer and close button
BeforeAfterPreview component (lines 300-386) correctly implements draggable slider with BEFORE/AFTER labels
addOns state (lines 429-439) correctly includes popup and beforeAfterSlider boolean fields
calculateTotal function (lines 828-849) correctly adds popup (€39) and beforeAfterSlider (€39) prices
AnimatePresence renders (lines 1174-1183) correctly show/hide all 3 new previews based on addon state
prices object (lines 812-826) correctly defines darkMode: 79, popup: 39, beforeAfterSlider: 39

dark_mode_preview.details: Interactive sun/moon toggle switches between light and dark mode demo. Price €79 correctly added/deducted.

popup_preview.details: Shows 'Show popup' button that displays 10% discount popup with WELCOME10 code. Popup can be closed with X. Price €39 correctly added/deducted.

before_after_slider_preview.details: Draggable slider with BEFORE/AFTER labels. Slider handle can be dragged to compare old vs new design. Price €39 correctly added/deducted.

price_calculation.details: Pro €699 + Dark Mode €79 + Popup €39 + Slider €39 = €856 correctly calculated

quote_summary_sidebar.details: All 3 add-ons (Dark mode, Pop-up, Before & after slider) appear in sidebar with correct prices

existing_previews.details: Booking System and Maintenance previews still work correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 38: Verified 3 new interactive add-on previews on Calculator page. Key data-testids: addon-darkMode, addon-popup, addon-beforeAfterSlider, price-summary, total-onetime. Prices: Dark Mode €79, Popup €39, Before/After Slider €39. All previews have interactive elements: Dark Mode has sun/moon toggle, Popup has 'Show popup' button that displays discount modal, Before/After has draggable slider. Components defined in CalculatorPage.jsx lines 207-386. State includes popup and beforeAfterSlider booleans. calculateTotal correctly sums all add-on prices.
